subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion, confidant and intimate friend! For some time this grief-stricken one hath received no news [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم و مونس و ندیم این حزین مدتى بود که خبر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @Shrines and Holy places, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
